title: T-088 — invoke enforceSamlPolicy from password/magic sign-in routes with real user_roles JOIN (FT-028)
prompt:
# T-088 — invoke enforceSamlPolicy from password/magic sign-in routes with real user_roles JOIN (FT-028)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.x, §8.x
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-028** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P1** (M effort)

## Goal
Call enforceSamlPolicy on password and magic-link sign-in with user_roles join; non-admin denied when enforce_for_non_admins=true.

## Implementation contract
1. sign-in.ts: after resolving target user + org, call enforceSamlPolicy({orgId, userId}).
2. enforceSamlPolicy joins user_roles to detect org.access.admin; admins bypass.
3. Reject path returns 403 with 'sso_enforced'.
4. Tests cover: (a) enforce=false → password allowed for everyone; (b) enforce=true + non-admin → 403; (c) enforce=true + org.access.admin → allowed.

## Files (scope)
- packages/auth/src/sign-in.ts [modify]
- packages/auth/src/enforce-saml-policy.ts [modify]
- packages/auth/src/__tests__/sso-enforcement.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given enforce_for_non_admins=true and a non-admin password sign-in, when called, then 403 'sso_enforced' returned.
2. Given enforce_for_non_admins=true and an org.access.admin password sign-in, when called, then sign-in proceeds.
3. Given enforce_for_non_admins=false, when any user sign-in is attempted, then password/magic flow proceeds.

## Test strategy
- RED: write sso-enforcement.test.ts asserting all three ACs before wiring.
- Mock Supabase admin via vi.fn().
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/auth test sso-enforcement`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass enforceSamlPolicy by trusting client-side org claim.
- Do not skip the user_roles JOIN (string-typing the role is forbidden).
- Do not log the rejected user's plaintext credential.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Wire enforceSamlPolicy into password and magic-link sign-in routes; when tenant_idp_config.enforce_for_non_admins=true, only org.access.admin can use password/magic sign-in.
pipeline_inputs.details: enforceSamlPolicy exists in the codebase but isn't invoked on the password/magic-link paths, so the 'enforce SSO' switch in tenant_idp_config has no effect there. Call the policy with a real user_roles JOIN to recognise break-glass org.access.admin accounts.
out_of_scope: Do not change the SAML callback handler in this task.
